'''rawuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izar|izar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izar|izar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rawuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræwizith|ræwizith]] || [[word:ræwizij|ræwizij]] || [[word:ræwizish|ræwizish]] || [[word:ræwizi|ræwizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawuwuzuth|rawuwuzuth]] || [[word:rawuwuzuj|rawuwuzuj]] || [[word:rawuwuzush|rawuwuzush]] || [[word:rawuwuzu|rawuwuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawuzuth|rawuzuth]] || [[word:rawuzuj|rawuzuj]] || [[word:rawuzush|rawuzush]] || [[word:rawuzu|rawuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawufzuth|rawufzuth]] || [[word:rawufzuj|rawufzuj]] || [[word:rawufzush|rawufzush]] || [[word:rawufzuf|rawufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawuzuthu|rawuzuthu]] || [[word:rawuzuju|rawuzuju]] || [[word:rawuzushu|rawuzushu]] || [[word:rawuzuku|rawuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawuzuth|rawuzuth]] || [[word:rawuzuj|rawuzuj]] || [[word:rawuzush|rawuzush]] || [[word:rawuzu|rawuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawuzuthul|rawuzuthul]] || [[word:rawuzujul|rawuzujul]] || [[word:rawuzushul|rawuzushul]] || [[word:rawuzukul|rawuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawuzuthuthu|rawuzuthuthu]] || [[word:rawuzujuju|rawuzujuju]] || [[word:rawuzushushu|rawuzushushu]] || [[word:rawuzuku|rawuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawuzuthun|rawuzuthun]] || [[word:rawuzujun|rawuzujun]] || [[word:rawuzushun|rawuzushun]] || [[word:rawuzukun|rawuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawuzuthuoro|rawuzuthuoro]] || [[word:rawuzujuoro|rawuzujuoro]] || [[word:rawuzushuoro|rawuzushuoro]] || [[word:rawuzukuoro|rawuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
